name: Zuger Kantonalbank
summary: Zuger Kantonalbank provides various banking products and services to private and corporate clients in Switzerland. It offers private banking products comprising bank accounts in various currencies and card products; personal and rental surety accounts; investment advisory, asset management, and online financial investment services; home financing services, including home financial consulting, mortgage, and home ownership services; and financial planning and tax services. The company also provides corporate banking products and services, such as corporate savings accounts; corporate and real estate financing services; occupational pension schemes; foundation and succession planning services; and corporate cards. In addition, it offers digital services, including e-banking, mobile banking, digital payment options, and online account opening services. The company operates through 14 branches. Zuger Kantonalbank was founded in 1892 and is based in Zug, Switzerland.
